Entities

bootstrap builder capture package

Decisions

ADR 001 ouro as distributable skeleton ADR 002 wiki as dual purpose ADR 003 doxygen tags in markdown ADR 004 webui as separate concern

project roadmap system architecture

Ourobor OS: Project Wiki

This is the internal documentation for the Ourobor OS project. It also serves as a reference example for users of the skill — this is what a populated ouro/wiki/ looks like in practice.

The distributable skill package lives in ouro/. This wiki/ directory documents the Ourobor OS project itself and mirrors the structure users receive when they run bootstrap.py. See ADR-002.

Core Documentation

  • Wiki Schema — Doxygen protocol and maintenance rules.

Entities

  • capture.py — Capture queue management and crawl tooling.
  • bootstrap.py — Project initialization and LLM environment detection.
  • builder.py — Static site generator for the wiki web UI.
  • package.py — Distribution packager for the ouro skill.

Architecture Decisions

  • ADR-001 — ouro/ is the distributable skeleton, not project docs.
  • ADR-002 — wiki/ serves as both internal docs and reference example.
  • ADR-003 — Doxygen tags embedded in Markdown.
  • ADR-004 — Web UI decoupled from core skill.

Patterns

  • Capture-Synthesize Loop — The core knowledge accumulation workflow.

Maps

  • System Architecture — Component relationships and data flows.
  • Project Roadmap — Phased development plan and current status.

Capture Queue

  • Capture Queue
